descriptions.text: Watch Fox Sports. Play Fox Sports. Includes: Fast and fluid gameplay, over 120 total teams, 24 unique stadiums, control the replay speed, choose your skill level, created your own leagues and touraments, "ambient realism" and improve your skills in practice mode.
Actua Soccer 2 (Fox Sports Soccer '99 in North America) is a sports video game developed and published by Gremlin Interactive for PlayStation and Microsoft Windows.
